description: Greedy approachability selector that drives the uniform soup toward a source-domain target set.
Resampling-based selector that keeps checkpoints surviving repeated support subsamples.
Validation-calibrated ambiguity coverage selector using split-conformal-style true-class nonconformity thresholds.
Greedy DPP MAP family with explicit subset repulsion and quality-weighted kernels.
Greedy MDL family that adds checkpoints only when fit-plus-code-length improves.
Adaptive-stop kernel herding baseline that greedily approximates the full-bank feature mean until a residual cutoff is met.
Distributional frontier selector based on empirical stochastic dominance instead of mean-loss ranking.
Finite-difference invariance selector inspired by TangentProp, using small deterministic brightness/contrast perturbations.
Version-space-inspired compression that preserves the full-bank disagreement region on source support.
